title: AI Operations Specialist

must_haves.req: Native fluency with AI platforms (Claude, ChatGPT)
must_haves.note: Self-directed AI-agent building with Claude Code since Aug 2023.

must_haves.req: Experience with automation tools incl. n8n; ability to build AI agents/automations/prompt workflows
must_haves.note: Builds Claude Code agents for competitor-intel and growth experiments.

must_haves.req: Demonstrated experience using AI to ship/transform work in prior teams/projects
must_haves.note: Strong personal/project evidence; less framed as cross-functional team AI-enablement at a 300-person co.

must_haves.req: No strong-coder requirement, but technical curiosity and native AI fluency
must_haves.note: Explicitly non-coding-gated; Ryan's profile matches the 'AI-fluent operator' archetype.
UK work history, relocating to London.

one_line_verdict: Tailor-made for Ryan's AI-agent-building operator profile; entry-level, no coding gate, Claude/n8n native fluency wanted — strongest match in this slice.
fetch_note: JD pulled from LinkedIn posting (4404313124, posted 6 days ago, 200+ applicants, open) + WebSearch. Direct ATS is jobs.ashbyhq.com/moss. Moss is a €180M spend-management SME platform (DE/NL/UK), 300+ staff; role is AI-adoption execution, not regulated-finance practitioner work.
